radiate.example: The fire radiated warmth into the room.
radiate.example_zh: 爐火把暖意散發到房間裡。

radioactive.example: Radioactive waste must be stored safely.
radioactive.example_zh: 放射性廢料必須安全儲存。

radish.example: She added a sliced radish to the salad.
radish.example_zh: 她在沙拉裡加了切片的蘿蔔。

radius.example: The circle has a radius of five centimeters.
radius.example_zh: 這個圓的半徑是五公分。

rap.example: He likes to listen to rap music.

rash.example: She got a red rash on her arm.

ratify.example: The two nations ratified the treaty.
ratify.example_zh: 兩國正式批准了這項條約。

realization.example: The realization of her dream took years.
realization.example_zh: 她的夢想花了好幾年才實現。

reckon.example: I reckon it will rain tomorrow.

reconcile.example_zh: 這兩個朋友終於和好了。

recreational.example: The park has many recreational activities.
recreational.example_zh: 這座公園有許多休閒活動。

redundancy.example: Remove the redundancy from your writing.
redundancy.example_zh: 把你文章裡多餘的部分刪掉。

reef.example: Colorful fish live near the coral reef.
reef.example_zh: 色彩繽紛的魚住在珊瑚礁附近。

referendum.example: The people voted in a referendum.

refine.example: They refine oil at this factory.
refine.example_zh: 他們在這間工廠提煉石油。

reflective.example: She wears a reflective vest at night.

refresh.example: A cold drink will refresh you.
refresh.example_zh: 一杯冷飲會讓你精神一振。

refreshment.example: Refreshments will be served after the talk.

refute.example: She refuted his argument with facts.
refute.example_zh: 她用事實駁斥了他的論點。

rehabilitate.example: The program helps to rehabilitate the injured.
rehabilitate.example_zh: 這個計畫幫助傷者復原。

rehearse.example: The actors rehearsed the play all week.
rehearse.example_zh: 演員們排練這齣戲排了一整週。

reign.example: The queen's reign lasted fifty years.
The king reigned for many years.
reign.example_zh: 這位國王統治了許多年。

rejoice.example: The whole town rejoiced at the good news.
rejoice.example_zh: 全鎮都為這好消息歡欣鼓舞。

relay.example: Our team won the relay race.
Please relay the message to her.
relay.example_zh: 請把這個口信轉達給她。

relentless.example: The relentless rain flooded the streets.
relentless.example_zh: 下個不停的大雨淹沒了街道。

reliance.example: We should reduce our reliance on cars.
reliance.example_zh: 我們應該減少對汽車的依賴。

reliant.example: He is too reliant on his phone.

remainder.example: She gave the remainder of the cake to me.
remainder.example_zh: 她把剩下的蛋糕給了我。

reminiscent.example: The smell was reminiscent of my childhood.

reproduce.example: The printer can reproduce the photo exactly.
reproduce.example_zh: 這台印表機能精確地複製照片。

reptile.example: A snake is a kind of reptile.

resent.example_zh: 她對受到不公平的對待感到憤恨。

reside.example: They reside in a quiet village.
reside.example_zh: 他們住在一個寧靜的村莊。

resistant.example: The plant is resistant to cold weather.

respective.example: They went to their respective homes.

restoration.example: The restoration of the old church took years.
restoration.example_zh: 這座老教堂的修復花了好幾年。

restrain.example: She could not restrain her laughter.

restraint.example: He showed great restraint when provoked.
restraint.example_zh: 被激怒時他展現了極大的克制。

revelation.example: The news came as a complete revelation.
revelation.example_zh: 這則消息完全出乎大家意料。

revival.example: There has been a revival of old games.
revival.example_zh: 懷舊遊戲又重新流行起來。

revive.example: The doctor managed to revive the patient.

revolt.example: The people rose up in revolt.
The workers revolted against the boss.

revolve.example: The earth revolves around the sun.

rigorous.example: The athletes follow a rigorous training plan.
rigorous.example_zh: 運動員遵循嚴格的訓練計畫。

ripple.example: The stone made ripples on the pond.

rivalry.example: There is a friendly rivalry between the teams.
rivalry.example_zh: 這兩隊之間有著良性的競爭。

roam.example: Wild horses roam across the plain.

robust.example: He is robust and rarely gets sick.

rotation.example: The rotation of the earth causes day and night.

royalty.example: The writer earns royalty from her books.
royalty.example_zh: 這位作家靠她的書賺取版稅。

rubbish.example: Please put the rubbish in the bin.

rugged.example_zh: 他們翻越崎嶇的群山健行。

ruthless.example: The ruthless ruler showed no mercy.
ruthless.example_zh: 這位冷酷的統治者毫不留情。
